report.summary: Cycle-close v5: No new commits since cb65a9d (Day 42, ~24h old). 397 published slugs, 2 new pages in queue (DeFi Insurance + Airdrop Farming guides). TS errors unchanged. All 6 API routes structurally sound. Rate limiting gap persists on public data routes.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: HEAD unchanged: cb65a9d (publish: promote 5 pages to production, Day 42). No new commits or regressions this cycle.

TypeScript: 42 errors total — 40 in structured-data.examples.ts (non-critical docs/example file), 2 real errors in /learn/crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx (unescaped JSX < and > at lines 531, 533). Same as v4.
Published slugs: 397 total in PUBLISHED_PAGES. 1,066 total page.tsx files in src/app/.
Dynamic routes ([slug]) correctly serve most 'missing' static paths — /learn/[slug], /exchanges/learn/[slug], /investing/crypto/[slug], etc. Not a real gap.
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 pages awaiting promotion — /learn/defi-insurance-guide-2026 and /learn/airdrop-farming-guide-2026 (queue changed from v4's Hyperliquid + Oracles).
Production build cannot be verified locally (VM bus error / OOM). Vercel builds with ignoreBuildErrors:true.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 public API routes present and structurally configured: prices (60s), trending (300s), fear-greed (600s), market-metrics (60s), market-dominance (300s), defi-yields (300s).
Cache TTLs and stale-while-revalidate headers correctly set across all routes.
Fallback data coverage: only prices and market-dominance have hardcoded fallbacks. trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, and defi-yields lack fallback data — risk of blank UI during upstream outages.
Rate limiting: rate-limiter.ts exists but is NOT wired into any of the 6 public data routes. Only health and cache-stats use it. Public routes remain unprotected against abuse.
defi-yields remains the weakest route — no in-memory cache layer in the route handler, no hardcoded fallback, returns 500 on upstream failure.
Cannot verify live API responses from sandbox (degen0x.com egress blocked). Source code audit only.

sections.title: DevOps
items: Vercel project config intact: prj_2Hn4Kdtu6fM13sSpxsdnmsJWGI75, org team_crOFt5ZIDYkZ8TXrZubTK8qj.
next.config.ts healthy: standalone output, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency=4, workerThreads=false, ignoreBuildErrors=true.
Middleware (127 lines): Edge Runtime compliant, PILLAR_PAGES inlined, security headers set (X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy).
Static assets cache: /_next/static/* set to public, max-age=31536000, immutable — correct.
Latest deploy: cb65a9d from 2026-03-16 11:17 UTC+1. No new deploys needed this cycle.
No error spikes detectable from source — live monitoring requires Vercel dashboard access.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Last 48h: 6 commits — Day 42 publish (5 pages promoted), 4 build fixes (WhaleWatchClient, use-client/metadata splits, market-recap, ecosystem routes), Day 15 publish (3 learn guides).
Current state: 397 published / 1,066 total pages = 37% published. 2 pages in queue ready for next promotion.
Carry-over from v4: JSX errors in crypto-index-funds-guide still unfixed. Rate limiter still not wired to public routes. defi-yields route still lacks fallback.
No new blockers since v4. Build fixes from recent commits resolved the WhaleWatchClient and use-client/metadata conflicts.
Next action: Fix the 2 JSX errors in crypto-index-funds-guide, promote the 2 queued pages (DeFi Insurance + Airdrop Farming), then deploy.
